message:
perf: eliminate redundant Mutex acquisition on concurrent commit path

Add pending_conflict_pages_conservative() trait method that returns
write-set page numbers directly via new write_set_page_numbers() without
acquiring PagerInner Mutex. Both commit paths now call the conservative
version instead of pending_conflict_pages(), removing the third Mutex
acquisition per concurrent commit.

For INSERT-heavy workloads without freelist churn, the conservative
estimate is identical. Phase A already serializes freelist reconciliation
under its own lock.

Also add export_database_bytes() on SimplePager: checkpoints WAL then
reads main DB file in chunks for serialization use cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
